brand_dna.category: Handmade-in-USA bags and accessories built for daily commute and weekend travel.
brand_dna.core_belief: Well-made goods should improve with age - 'Built on the idea that well-made goods should improve with age.'
proof_points: Every piece cut, printed, and sewn in the USA since 2014
Leather, fabrics, and hardware sourced domestically
Vegetable-tanned Vachetta leather and waterproof/ballistic nylon construction
Warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship, plus repairs offered
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, understated American craftsmanship - durable and timeless rather than trend-driven or loud.

voice_pillars.name: Built to Last
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks to durability and longevity, framing every product as an investment that ages well.
voice_pillars.quote: built for the long haul and just gets better with age

voice_pillars.name: Made in America
voice_pillars.desc: Leads with domestic craft and local manufacturing as a point of pride and proof.
voice_pillars.quote: Every piece cut, printed, and sewn in the USA.

voice_pillars.name: Motion Between Worlds
voice_pillars.desc: Positions bags as bridging office routine and weekend escape.
voice_pillars.quote: designed to carry you between daily routine and weekend adventure

voice_pillars.name: Considered Craft
voice_pillars.desc: Uses restrained, quality-focused language centered on materials and thoughtful design.
voice_pillars.quote: Dedicated to the Craft of Well-Made Things

phrases: everyday commuting to the office, the gym, or carry-on travel
ultra-durable nylon that's lightweight, waterproof, and easy to wipe clean

icp: Design-conscious working professionals who commute and travel often, value American craftsmanship, and pay more for a durable bag that ages well instead of replacing cheap ones.

personas.name: The Daily Commuter
personas.description: Office-to-gym-to-travel professional who wants one dependable bag for every leg of the day - moved by durability, laptop fit, and easy care.

personas.name: The Craft Loyalist
personas.description: Values American-made quality and materials that improve with age - moved by handmade-in-USA origin, Vachetta leather, and the warranty.

personas.name: The Corporate Gifter
personas.description: Team lead or brand manager sourcing branded gifts - moved by custom fabric, color, hardware, and branding made to spec.

offers: Free returns and exchanges on unused items within 30 days (full purchase amount refunded)
Return shipping fee waived for domestic exchanges or store credit
Orders typically ship within one business day; 2nd day and overnight shipping available
Warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship
Custom corporate gifting made to your specifications

allowed.claim: Made in the USA - every piece cut, printed, and sewn in the United States.
Made from ultra-durable waterproof nylon with vegetable-tanned Vachetta leather.
Free returns and exchanges on unused items within 30 days.
Leather, fabrics, and hardware sourced domestically.
Warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship.

banned.claim: Calling the bags 'sustainable' or 'eco-friendly' without qualification.
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - unqualified sustainability claim; site only offers recycled/vegan materials on custom request.
FTC Green Guides - unverifiable absolute environmental claim not backed on site.
FTC Green Guides - specific claim requires verifiable backing the brand has not published.

banned.claim: Any claim that a bag 'relieves back or shoulder pain' or 'corrects posture'.
banned.why: Banned medical/orthopedic claim for this category.
Vegan materials are only available for custom orders on request, so a broad claim would be misleading.
